lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: Are you a cook? I need more staff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's going on here?

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: This is the Hosidius Mess. It was set up to help feed the soldiers from the Shayzien Encampment. Much better than anything they can cook over there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How come it's so far from Hosidius?

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: The solders do enough hard work, so it seemed only right not to make them walk all the way across Kourend for a bit of food.

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: Anyway, enough chatting. Are you a cook?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I can do some cooking. Well, my level's [number<20], anyway.

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: Hah! You'll need a level of 20 to cook anything for these soldiers. They're picky about what they eat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I can do some cooking.

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: Good. When you've got more Hosidius favour, come back and I'll have plenty for you to do.

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: Good. The soldiers like stew, meat pies and pineapple pizza. You'll find ingredients in the cupboards.

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: When you've made something, put it on the buffet tables, and you'll gain experience based on how much the soldiers appreciate them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm off.

sections.title: Attempting to serve food or take servery ingredients without 20% Hosidius Favour

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: You're not authorised to work in my kitchen.

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: They're not going to eat anything you've got there. Make them meat pies, stew or pineapple pizza.

sections.title: Attempting to eat servery food or servery ingredients

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: Hey, that's not for you!

sections.title: Serving meat pie, pineapple pizza, or stew
Serving anything other type of food

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: They're not going to eat that. Make them meat pies, stew or pineapple pizza.

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: They're not going to eat that. Use the ingredients provided here.

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Ewesey
lines.text: Hey, I have something for you but you don't have any space for it!
